creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
in addition to fix ftp.freesoftware.com, I've reviewed and fixed all ports
depending on this site (42) plus some related ports (3).

most changes concerns :

Makefile
	MASTER_SITES, MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR, PATCH_SITES, PATCH_SITE_SUBDIR
	whenever possible, MASTER_SITE_XXX from bsd.sites.mk has been used.
	MASTER_SITE_REDHAT has been added to bsd.sites.mk

	RPM_MIRRORS, STDDIR and UPDDIR have been deleted

	DISTFILES has been changed to DISTNAME and EXTRACT_SUFX

	commands such as rpm, cpio, etc. have been changed to ${COMMAND}
	of course, the corresponding variable has been added

	MANCOMPRESSED has been deleted if USE_IMAKE exists

	targets have been made quiet (@ added)

	.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS) has been added if missing
	${PREFIX}/share/doc/${PORTNAME} has been changed to ${DOCSDIR}
	html docs have been move from ${DOCSDIR} to ${DOCSDIR}/html

	etc.

pkg-plist
	@comment $FreeBSD$ has been added if missing
	%%PORTDOCS%% has been added if missing

all ports except the linux ones or thoses marked n/t have been fetched,
built, installed and packaged.

special comments are marked ****.
